LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HAMID NOORI'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUNE 14, 2012 BECAUSE THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. THE OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM ON JUNE 8, 2012 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. IF THIS IS NOT DONE, THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

DISCOVERY 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF HAMID NOORI'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES FROM MERCEDEZ-BENZ USA, LLC AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS OF $1800.00 IS GRANTED IN PART. DEFENDANT MUST SUPPLEMENT ITS RESPONSES AND FULLY RESPOND WITHIN 10 DAYS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 6, 7, 49, 52, 60 AND 61; FORM INTERROGATORIES 1.1, 3.1, 12.2, 12.6, 12.7, 15.1 AND 17.1; REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS 32 AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION 25 AND 26 WITH RESPECT TO RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS RELEVANT TO THE ENGINE, BRAKE SYSTEM OR COOLANT SYSTEM, OTHERWISE DENIED. MERCEDES BENZ TO PRODUCE TAC DOCUMENTS TO THE EXTENT TO PROVIDE AVAILABLE NAMES IN THE DEALERSHIP IT DEALT WITH WHICH IS NOT REFLECTED IN THE TAC. THE COURT DID NOT AWARD SANCTIONS. MR. PUTNAM TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED. (301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HAMID NOORI'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $35,000 AND THE ENTIRETY OF COSTS CLAIMED IN THE AMOUNT OF $11,536 FOR A TOTAL AWARD OF $46,536. THE NATURE AND COMPLEXITY OF THE CASE DO NOT WARRANT A MULTIPLIER. ORDER PROVIDED BY MOVING PARTY WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF HAMID NOORI'S Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs. Granted in part. Plaintiff is awarded attorney fees in the amount of $35,000 and the entirety of costs claimed in the amount of $11,536 for a total award of $46,536. The nature and complexity of the case do not warrant a multiplier. Order provided by moving party was signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Continued To Jun-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF HAMID NOORI'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued on the court's own motion to June 14, 2012 because the court did not receive courtesy copies of the opposition papers. The opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to department 302 no later than 4pm on June 8, 2012 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. If this is not done, the motion will be granted in its entirety. The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Mercedez-Benz Usa, Llc And Request For Sanctions Of $1800.00 Gainst
Off Calendar Jul-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARTIN S. PUTNAM, TEL. NO. (510) 318-6308 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOSEPH R. WHEELER OF THE UNIVERSAL, SHANNON & WHEELER, LLP, TEL. NO. (916) 780-4050 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT MERCEDES BENZ.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF HAMID NOORI'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Mercedez-Benz Usa, Llc And Request For Sanctions Of $1800.00 is Granted in part. Defendant must supplement its responses and fully respond within 10 days to Special Interrogatories 6, 7, 49, 52, 60 and 61;
Form Interrogatories 1.1, 3.1, 12.2, 12.6, 12.7, 15.1 and 17.1; Request for Admissions 32 and Request for Production 25 and 26 with respect to responsive documents relevant to the engine, brake system or coolant system, otherwise denied. MERCEDES BENZ TO PRODUCE TAC DOCUMENTS TO THE EXTENT TO PROVIDE AVAILABLE NAMES IN THE DEALERSHIP IT DEALT WITH WHICH IS NOT REFLECTED IN THE TAC. The court did not award sanctions. MR. PUTNAM TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)
